description_long: This object is a rectangular, red metal barbecue grill with a robust, industrial design. The front features two large drawers, one of which is open, suggesting storage for grilling tools or accessories. The top surface is flat and displays three distinct grilling tools: a wrench, a screwdriver, and an orange power drill, all rendered in a blocky, stylized manner. The sides and back are solid red panels, with no visible vents or handles, and the entire unit stands on four small black wheels for mobility. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a matte finish and hard, smooth surfaces. The absence of a visible lid or grates on the top suggests this is a utility or tool storage grill, possibly for maintenance or repair tasks in an urban garage or workshop setting.
description: A red, rectangular barbecue grill with two large drawers, tool graphics on the top, and four black wheels. The design is industrial and sturdy, with a matte finish and no visible lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large drawers (one open), tool graphics on the top, and four wheels at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid red panel and the side of the open drawer, with no additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain red back panel and the top surface with tool graphics, no drawers or handles visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a solid red panel and the side of the open drawer visible.
